title: Extended Compressor
description: An Extended Crafting addon that adds an Extended Compressor with no stack limit, can input unlimited amounts of items at once.
body:
This mod is an addon for [Extended Crafting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extended-crafting).  

It adds a new machine: Extended Compressor.
Unlike the vanilla compressor, this machine allows you to input an unlimited number of items in a single operation – regardless of stack size or total amount. Throw in 1 item, 10,000 items, or even more。  
Furthermore, extended compressor offers 4× energy storage and 2× compression speed by default(can be modified via configuration file).

这是Extended Crafting 的附属模组，添加了可以一次性输入无限物品的扩展压缩机。    

原版压缩机会受到 64 个堆叠上限的限制，而本模组的扩展压缩机没有单次输入的数量上限——无论你放进去 1 个、1 万个，还是更多物品。  
同时，扩展压缩机还默认提供了4×能量存储和2×压缩速度（可以通过配置文件修改）。
